00026 #include "wrappers.h"
00027 
00028 #include "oobj.h"
00029 #include "opcodes.h"
00030 #include "tree.h"
00031 #include "sys_api.h"
00032 
00033 #define MAX_ARRAY_DIMENSIONS 255
00034 
00035 #define UNKNOWN_STACK_SIZE -1
00036 #define UNKNOWN_REGISTER_COUNT -1
00037 #define UNKNOWN_RET_INSTRUCTION -1
00038 
00039 #undef MAX
00040 #undef MIN
00041 #define MAX(a, b) ((a) > (b) ? (a) : (b))
00042 #define MIN(a, b) ((a) < (b) ? (a) : (b))
00043 
00044 #define BITS_PER_INT   (CHAR_BIT * sizeof(int)/sizeof(char))
00045 #define SET_BIT(flags, i)  (flags[(i)/BITS_PER_INT] |= \
00046                            ((unsigned)1 << ((i) % BITS_PER_INT)))
00047 #define    IS_BIT_SET(flags, i) (flags[(i)/BITS_PER_INT] & \
00048                            ((unsigned)1 << ((i) % BITS_PER_INT)))
00049 
00050 typedef unsigned long fullinfo_type;
00051 typedef unsigned int *bitvector;
00052 
00053 #define GET_ITEM_TYPE(thing) ((thing) & 0x1F)
00054 #define GET_INDIRECTION(thing) (((thing) & 0xFFFF) >> 5)
00055 #define GET_EXTRA_INFO(thing) ((unsigned short)((thing) >> 16))
00056 #define WITH_ZERO_INDIRECTION(thing) ((thing) & ~(0xFFE0))
00057 #define WITH_ZERO_EXTRA_INFO(thing) ((thing) & 0xFFFF)
00058 
00059 #define MAKE_FULLINFO(type, indirect, extra) \
00060      ((fullinfo_type)((type) + ((indirect) << 5) + ((extra) << 16)))
00061 #define MAKE_CLASSNAME_INFO(context, classname, addr) \
00062        MAKE_FULLINFO(ITEM_Object, 0, \
00063        Str2ID_Local(context, &context->classHash, (classname), (addr), false))
00064 #define MAKE_CLASSNAME_INFO_WITH_COPY(context, classname, addr) \
00065        MAKE_FULLINFO(ITEM_Object, 0, \
00066        Str2ID_Local(context, &context->classHash, (classname), (addr), true))
00067 #define MAKE_Object_ARRAY(indirect) \
00068        (context->object_info + ((indirect) << 5))
00069 
00070 #define NULL_FULLINFO MAKE_FULLINFO(ITEM_Object, 0, 0)
00071 
00072 /* opc_invokespecial calls to <init> need to be treated special */
00073 #define opc_invokeinit 0x100
00074 
00075 struct context_type {
00076     /* these fields are per class */
00077     ClassClass *class;        /* current class */
00078     struct StrIDhash *classHash;
00079     fullinfo_type object_info;    /* fullinfo for java/lang/Object */
00080     fullinfo_type string_info;    /* fullinfo for java/lang/String */
00081     fullinfo_type throwable_info; /* fullinfo for java/lang/Throwable */
00082 
00083     fullinfo_type currentclass_info; /* fullinfo for context->class */
00084     fullinfo_type superclass_info;   /* fullinfo for superclass */
00085 
00086     /* these fields are per method */
00087     struct methodblock *mb;    /* current method */
00088     unsigned char *code;    /* current code object */
00089     short *code_data;        /* offset to instruction number */
00090     struct instruction_data_type *instruction_data; /* info about each */
00091     struct handler_info_type *handler_info;
00092     fullinfo_type *superClasses; /* null terminated superclasses */
00093     int instruction_count;    /* number of instructions */
00094     fullinfo_type return_type;    /* function return type */
00095     fullinfo_type swap_table[4]; /* used for passing information */
00096     int bitmask_size;        /* words needed to hold bitmap of arguments */
00097 
00098     /* Used by inliner */
00099     bool redoJsr;
00100 
00101     /* Used by the space allocator */
00102     struct CCpool *CCroot, *CCcurrent;
00103     char *CCfree_ptr;
00104     int CCfree_size;
00105 
00106     /* Jump here on any error. */
00107     jmp_buf jump_buffer;
00108 };
00109 
00110 struct stack_info_type {
00111     struct stack_item_type *stack;
00112     int stack_size;
00113 };
00114 
00115 struct register_info_type {
00116     int register_count;        /* number of registers used */
00117     fullinfo_type *registers;
00118     int mask_count;        /* number of masks in the following */
00119     struct mask_type *masks;
00120 };
00121 
00122 struct mask_type {
00123     int entry;
00124     int *modifies;
00125 };
00126 
00127 typedef unsigned short flag_type;
00128 
00129 struct instruction_data_type {
00130     opcode_type opcode;        /* may turn into "canonical" opcode */
00131     unsigned changed:1;        /* has it changed */
00132     unsigned protected:1;    /* must accessor be a subclass of "this" */
00133     unsigned is_target:1;
00134 
00135     union {
00136     int i;            /* operand to the opcode */
00137     int *ip;
00138     fullinfo_type fi;
00139     } operand, operand2;
00140     fullinfo_type p;
00141     struct stack_info_type stack_info;
00142     struct register_info_type register_info;
00143 #define FLAG_REACHED            0x01 /* instruction reached */
00144 #define FLAG_NEED_CONSTRUCTOR   0x02 /* must call this.<init> or super.<init> */
00145 #define FLAG_NO_RETURN          0x04 /* must throw out of method */
00146     flag_type or_flags;        /* true for at least one path to this inst */
00147 #define FLAG_CONSTRUCTED        0x01 /* this.<init> or super.<init> called */
00148     flag_type and_flags;    /* true for all paths to this instruction */
00149     unsigned short offset;
00150     unsigned short length;
00151 };
00152 
00153 struct handler_info_type {
00154     int start, end, handler;
00155     struct stack_info_type stack_info;
00156 };
00157 
00158 struct stack_item_type {
00159     fullinfo_type item;
00160     struct stack_item_type *next;
00161 };
00162 
00163 typedef struct context_type context_type;
00164 typedef struct instruction_data_type instruction_data_type;
00165 typedef struct stack_item_type stack_item_type;
00166 typedef struct register_info_type register_info_type;
00167 typedef struct stack_info_type stack_info_type;
00168 typedef struct mask_type mask_type;
Generated on Mon Mar 14 2016 15:25:27 for @PACKAGE_NAME@ by  1.7.1
